delivery.headerText: Choose a saved one or add a new one

customerSearch.label: Search customer
customerSearch.emptySearch: We didn't find customers with that search. Try another detail or tap "New customer".
customerSearch.emptyState: No saved customers for delivery yet.

errors.invalidPaymentMethod: Payment method must be cash or card.
errors.invalidPaymentAmount: Payment amount must be a non-negative integer.
errors.insufficientPaymentAmount: Payment amount must cover the order total.
errors.cardPaymentExactMatchRequired: Card payment must match the order total exactly.
errors.orderItemsRequired: Order must include at least one item.
errors.orderItemProductIdRequired: Each order item must have a product assigned.
errors.orderItemQuantityInvalid: Quantity must be a positive integer.
errors.orderItemUnitPriceInvalid: Unit price must be a non-negative integer.
errors.customerIdAndCustomerConflict: Select a saved customer or enter a new one, not both.
errors.localOrderCustomerForbidden: In-store orders cannot include delivery customer data.
errors.localOrderDeliveryPersonForbidden: In-store orders cannot have a delivery person.
errors.customerNotFound: We couldn't find that customer. Try searching again.
errors.dbError: We couldn't process the checkout. Please try again.
errors.generic: An unexpected error occurred while processing the checkout.
errors.formDeliveryNewCustomerRequired: For delivery, you need a customer, phone, and address.
errors.formDeliverySelectOrCreate: Select a saved customer or tap "New customer" to add one.
errors.formEmptyCart: Add at least one product before checking out.
